title: Flodesk vs Zoho Campaigns (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Flodesk vs Zoho Campaigns: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: Flodesk vs Zoho Campaigns: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Flodesk and Zoho Campaigns comes down to your specific use case. Flodesk is built for visual brands, photographers, and designers, while Zoho Campaigns targets Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses.
choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on visual brands, photographers, and designers
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses

faq.q: Is Flodesk better than Zoho Campaigns?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Flodesk wins for visual brands, photographers, and designers, while Zoho Campaigns is stronger for Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Flodesk or Zoho Campaigns?
faq.a: Zoho Campaigns starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Zoho Campaigns to Flodesk?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
